normalized_research_claim: The frozen v03 data contract detects injected action-role and temporal mismatches, and makes the 240x426 versus 240x424 preprocessing choice explicit before model training.
claim_status: SUPPORTED only for data/contract detection after all M5-A launch checks pass

target_task_and_dataset_assumptions.action_scope: train-only calibration; held-out robot trajectory excluded
target_task_and_dataset_assumptions.retrieval_scope: normalized segment phase + task pool membership

minimum_viable_experiment_set.expected_evidence: each frozen-contract detector triggers on train-only injected mismatch
all views are nonempty and never cross a canonical segment
frame/clock/step anomaly detector triggers with zero segment crossing
shape strategy is explicit; action hash and phase retrieval contract are invariant

sensitivity_analysis.M5A: fixed severe perturbations verify detector behavior
sensitivity_analysis.M5B: NEEDS_EXPERIMENT for graded severity and model performance curves

robustness_generalization_check: contract-level only in M5-A; model robustness NEEDS_EXPERIMENT
qualitative_analysis: NEEDS_EXPERIMENT in M5-B for visual retrieval/crop examples
failure_case_analysis: a low same-frame numeric error can coexist with 100% temporal leakage
phase-only retrieval cannot validate visual crop robustness
single-pilot data cannot support multi-seed model claims
missing_evidence: independent or expanded human-only held-out pool
retrieval modality, geometry/visual, top-k and pool-growth model ablations
risk_of_overclaiming: M5-A must not be cited as evidence that RECAP outperforms baselines, is model-robust, or is deployable.
recommended_next_stage: finish formal M4 training, then run M5-B before Gate C decision
fairness_and_validity: all action/lag thresholds are evaluated on train tasks only
all time views use the same canonical episodes and gap policy
synthetic temporal injections use a fixed recorded seed
resolution audit is read-only and records exact crop/pad operations
